_note: Consent documents for the MyBI consent gate. MIRROR of the app-bundled authoritative copy (src/legal/consentLocal.ts) — edit THERE first, then republish here. The app hashes id+title+body; any text change re-prompts every user on next launch.

docs.title: End User Licence Agreement
docs.body:
MyBI is proprietary software. Subject to your plan and these terms, you are granted a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable licence to install and use MyBI on devices you control.

You may not copy, redistribute, resell, sublicense, rent, reverse engineer, decompile or create derivative works of the software, except where that restriction is prohibited by law.

MyBI is not directed at children. You must be at least 16 years old — or the age of digital consent in your country, if higher — to create a MyBI ID or sign in. By creating an account you confirm you meet this requirement.

Your projects, datasets and dashboards remain yours. MyBI claims no ownership over the content you create with it.

Plans (Free, Pro, Enterprise) and any billing are described in the Terms of Service. The software is provided "as is", without warranties, to the extent permitted by law, and our liability is limited as set out in the Terms.

We may update the software and these terms. Continued use after an update means you accept the change. Either party may end the licence; on termination you must stop using the software.

This agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales.

docs.title: Privacy Policy
docs.summary: What we collect, and what we don't.
docs.body:
MyBI runs on your device. Your datasets and dashboards stay on your machine — they are not uploaded to us, and MyBI collects no usage telemetry or analytics.

To sign in we store a minimal account record (your email and display name) with our identity provider, used only to manage authentication, your licence/plan, and your acceptance of these terms.

Cloud backup and publishing only send data when YOU enable them, and only to the destination you choose (e.g. your own iCloud/Google Drive folder or your MyBI Server). Backups are encrypted with a key bound to your account.

AI features run on-device by default. A cloud AI engine is used only if you connect your own key or plan, and only the data you explicitly approve is sent — handled under that provider's terms, not ours.

Organisation confidentiality (Enterprise). If an organisation marks a project or dashboard as "Confidential", files exported or shared from it carry a marker identifying that organisation and its MyBI Server. Opening such a file in ANY edition of MyBI notifies that organisation's own MyBI Server that the file was opened — recording the file's identity, a per-install identifier of the device that opened it, the app edition and version, and the time. This is a data-loss-prevention measure that applies ONLY to files an organisation has explicitly marked Confidential; it does not read your other files, does not use your hardware identity, and reports only to the organisation's own server (never to MyBI). Files that are not marked Confidential carry no marker and are never reported. By opening a file marked Confidential you consent to this notification.

Camera and vision cards. If you add a camera or video card to a dashboard, the feed is processed on this device only and is never uploaded. Optional face detection — which can estimate visual attributes such as gender or expression for on-screen overlays and triggers — runs only after you enable it on that card, entirely on-device; detection models are downloaded as data files and cached. MyBI does not identify people, and no image, frame or detection result leaves your machine unless you yourself save or export it.

You have rights over your personal data, including access, correction and deletion. To exercise them, or to delete your account, contact us (accounts can also be deleted in-app under My Account). We keep your account data while your account is active.

docs.title: AI & Data Use
docs.summary: How the assistant uses your data.
docs.body:
The built-in assistant runs on-device by default. It can read your dataset values only after you grant per-use consent, and only within the row limit you set.

Cloud AI engines are off unless you connect your own key or plan. When connected, only the data you approve in each request is sent to that engine, under that engine provider's terms.

MyBI does not train any model on your data and does not send your data anywhere without an action you take.

AI output can be wrong. Assistant answers, generated columns and suggested transformations are estimates, not verified facts — review them before relying on them for any decision. Where the assistant changes data, the change is shown and reversible.
